title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the task with your partner and reach a decision.

content.task: Look at the following ideas. Discuss how important each one is for a successful career, then decide which two are most important.
content.followUp: Now decide which two factors are most important for career success.

script.text: Now I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas about factors for a successful career.
First, discuss how important each one is, and then decide which two are the most important. You have two minutes.
So, shall we start with good qualifications? I think having the right qualifications is essential because employers often require them.
That's a good point. What about work experience? I believe practical experience can sometimes be more valuable than formal qualifications.
Yes, I agree. Now, what do you think about networking skills? Being able to connect with the right people can open many doors.
Interesting. And personal qualities — things like determination and resilience. Do you think those matter more than the others?
Right. And finally, luck — do you think being in the right place at the right time plays a big role?
Now decide which two factors are most important for career success.
So, if we had to pick two, I'd say work experience and personal qualities. What do you think?
Thank you. That's the end of Part 3.
